```{=html}
<!-- case_when() - with .default -->
<script>
window.CWD_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '3750'],
  ['Adelie',    'Biscoe',    '3800'],
  ['Adelie',    'Dream',     '4500'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '5000']
];
window.CWD_COLS = ['species', 'island', 'body_mass_g'];
// Which rows match which condition: [cond1, cond2]
// Condition 1: body_mass_g > 4500 (row 3 only)
// Condition 2: body_mass_g < 3800 (row 0 only)
// Row 1 and 2 are unmatched and will use .default value
window.CWD_MATCHES = [
  [false, false, false, true],   // > 4500
  [true, false, false, false]    // < 3800
];
window.CWD_LABELS = ['Large', 'Small'];
window.CWD_COND_COLORS = ['#e8853a', '#4a86c5'];
window.CWD_DEFAULT_COLOR = '#9b59b6';  // purple for .default
</script>
```

::: {.cwd-stage-wrap}
<div id="cwd-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .cwd-frag id="cwd-cond-1"}
[]{.fragment .cwd-frag id="cwd-cond-2"}
[]{.fragment .cwd-frag id="cwd-default"}
[]{.fragment .cwd-frag id="cwd-result"}
